AuctionAdminAssign.description:
Admin assigns a provider to a quotation (with a suggested price).

Creates a new Auction with state=PENDING and the admin's price as
the initial bid. The provider can then accept as-is, counter-offer,
or decline.
AuctionAdminAssign.title: AuctionAdminAssign

AuctionItemObject.description: Original Lambda shape: { id: str, offer: str }.
AuctionItemObject.title: AuctionItemObject

AuctionProviderUpdate.description:
Provider accepts / counters an admin-assigned auction.

The provider can either:
- Accept as-is (no body required, or just provider_note)
- Counter-offer (provide price_load, people, etc.)
AuctionProviderUpdate.title: AuctionProviderUpdate

cfdi_use.description: Uso del CFDI: G03 (servicios profesionales), P01 (honorarios)
cfdi_use.title: Cfdi Use

info.description: FastAPI port of the Mobbit B2B/B2C marketplace Rust Lambdas. See `docs/research/business-domain.md` for the business context and `docs/research/deployment-drift.md` for the original infra.

get.description: Global listing of auctions across all quotations and providers. Supports pagination via `limit` and `offset`, and an optional filter by `quotation_id`. Sort is by `created_at` desc.

Response List Quotations Api Admin Quotation Get

post.description:
Creates a new Auction with state=PENDING. The `provider_id` comes in the body. The `admin_budget` is the price the admin sets. The provider can then accept, counter-offer, or decline.

Returns 409 if the provider already has an auction for this quotation.
post.summary: Assign a provider to a quotation (with admin budget)

schema.title: Response List Payments Api Admin Quotation  Quotation Id  Payment S Get

post.description:
Creates a Payment record (PENDING, type=STRIPE).

The actual Stripe Checkout Session is created by the B2C client
when they select an auction (see ``app/services/auction.py::
select_auction``). This endpoint is the admin-side recording of
the payment intent; the Stripe-hosted checkout flow lives on the
B2C frontend (PR5).
post.summary: Create a Stripe payment record for a quotation

post.description: Reuses the auction service; equivalent to the original `apigw_lambdas_auctions.tf` POST.

post.description:
Public endpoint. The client only submits their contact info.
The full quotation (addresses, services, items) is filled in by
the admin via the RCCM API.

put.description:
The B2C client picks one auction. This:
1. Transitions the chosen auction to SELECTED, all others to REJECTED.
2. Creates a Stripe Checkout Session.
3. Creates a Payment record (state = PENDING).

Returns the Checkout Session (so the client can redirect to its `url`).

schema.title: Response Select Auction Api B2C Quotation  Quotation Id  Auction Put

put.summary: Select an auction (B2C) — creates an MP preference

get.description:
All auctions submitted for a quotation. NOTE: original filter
`state = "FILLED"` was on quotations, not auctions; we just return
all auctions for the quotation here.

schema.title: Response List Auctions Api B2C Quotation  Quotation Id  Auction S Get

get.description:
All auctions where `provider_id = me`. The provider_id is taken
from the JWT (no provider can see another provider's auctions).

Response List My Auctions Api Provider Auction Get

get.description: The provider can only see their own auctions.

put.description:
The provider reviews the admin's suggested price and either:
- Accepts as-is (set `accept_admin_price: true`)
- Counter-offers (set `price_load` to the new total)

Only works on PENDING auctions. Returns 409 otherwise.

post.description: The provider refuses the assignment. State → DECLINED. The auction is hidden from the B2C client's list.

post.description:

Allowed formats: PDF, PNG, JPG

the sub is `settings.dev_provider_id`.
